{{Quote|Funeral services for pilots Tabba, Kraigg and Lady Blue, killed in action near the Japai System, will be held at 0700 hours.|[[E-mail]] to ''Defiance'' personnel|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Kraigg''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. Kraigg was killed in action near the [[Japai system/Legends|Japai system]] in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], along with fellow pilots [[Tabba]] and [[Lady Blue]]. The three Rebels were honored together in a funeral service.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
